subject: Human Resources
title: Workforce Planning
description: Learn Workforce Planning in one minute.

hook.text: A tech company wins a huge contract but has no engineers to deliver it. The deal falls apart.

buildup.text: Workforce planning forecasts what talent the organization will need—and when—to meet future demands.

discovery.text: It analyzes current headcount, turnover rates, retirement projections, and growth plans.

twist.text: Planning isn't just about hiring more. Sometimes it means reskilling existing employees for new roles.

climax.text: Companies that plan their workforce avoid panic hiring, layoffs, and the costly cycle of both.

punchline.text: Plan the people before you plan the projects.

quiz.question: What does workforce planning forecast?
options: Future talent needs based on business demands
